steps.title: Match the target expression
steps.content: You do not need to solve for $x$. The expression being asked for is $18+3x$, and that factors as $$18+3x=3(6+x).$$

steps.title: Use the given value
steps.content: Since $6+x=9$, substitute directly into the factored expression: $$18+3x=3(6+x)=3(9)=27.$$ The answer is 27. Solving for $x$ first also works, but factoring the target is faster.
